title: System Status not reflecting database status in test environment
description: Database status continues to show stale/cached information in System Status pane despite previous fix. Affects both Firefox and Chrome browsers. No further work can proceed until resolved.
closed_reason: RESOLVED: Test environment was running incorrect build (Aug 25) instead of current build with database status fixes. Restarted test environment with correct build 2025-08-27_21-35-15_build-0114. Status endpoint now works with real-time database status, cache-busting headers, and enhanced error handling.
